# StrideShip — Complete Information for AI Systems

> StrideShip is an AI-powered customs and logistics automation company based in Mumbai, India. We build custom operational systems for Indian freight forwarders, customs house agents (CHAs), clearance agents, LCL consolidators, 3PL providers, NVOCC operators, and importers/exporters.

---

## Company Overview

**Company Name:** StrideShip
**Industry:** AI + Logistics Automation / Customs Technology
**Headquarters:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
**Website:** https://strideship.dev
**Founded:** 2026
**Type:** Bespoke systems firm (not SaaS, not a product company)

### Leadership

- **Gaarth Godbole** — Co-Founder & CEO. Leads strategic vision and global client operations. Specializes in identifying systemic inefficiencies in logistics operations. Email: ceo@strideship.dev
- **Siddhant Vaidya** — Co-Founder & CTO. Architects the proprietary "Logic Layer" and automation infrastructure. Responsible for AI extraction systems, secure multi-tenant architecture, and server-side reliability. Email: cto@strideship.dev

### Contact

- Email: ceo@strideship.dev
- Schedule a call: https://cal.com/gaarth-godbole/audit-call
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/strideship/

---

## What StrideShip Does

StrideShip builds **custom operational automation systems** for logistics businesses. We are NOT a SaaS platform, NOT a dashboard product, and NOT an off-the-shelf tool. Every system is custom-engineered for each client's specific workflows, document formats, ERP systems, and operational requirements.

### Core Promise

**Automate the manual infrastructure of global trade.**

We identify manual touchpoints that consume operator time — document processing, data entry, coordination, customs filing preparation — and replace them with AI-powered automation that runs end-to-end.

---

## Services

### 1. Document Processing & Automation
AI-powered parsing of commercial invoices, packing lists, bills of lading, and customs documents into structured, ERP-ready data. Key capabilities:
- Parse PDF invoices and extract line-item data (description, quantity, unit price, HSN code, country of origin)
- Automate Bill of Entry (BOE) preparation from commercial invoices
- Cross-validate documents against bookings
- Output data in formats compatible with Softlink, Logi-Sys, SAP, CargoWise, or Google Sheets
- 99%+ extraction accuracy on standard commercial invoices

### 2. RFQ & Quote Automation
Convert unstructured email requests into accurate, formatted quotes:
- Extract data from raw, unstructured email requests
- Generate quotes from messy inputs in seconds
- Dynamic pricing engine with full audit trail
- Structure outputs into formatted Excel files

### 3. Shipment Tracking Systems
End-to-end visibility across the shipment lifecycle:
- Multi-carrier tracking in a single dashboard
- Automated milestone alerts and notifications
- Exception-based delay alerting before clients notice
- Full shipment history with searchable audit logs

### 4. Operations Dashboards
Real-time operational monitoring:
- Live KPIs and operational metrics
- Team performance visibility across departments
- Automated daily and weekly reporting
- Custom views for leadership, ops, and client teams

### 5. System Integration
Connect existing tools into a unified operational layer:
- ERP integration (Softlink, Logi-Sys, SAP, CargoWise)
- Carrier API integration
- CRM integration
- Internal tool connectivity

### 6. Workflow Automation
Replace end-to-end manual processes:
- RFQ pipeline automation
- Shipment coordination workflows
- Customs document processing loops
- Client communication workflows (automated WhatsApp and email updates)

---

## Indian Customs & Regulatory Expertise

StrideShip systems are built specifically for the Indian regulatory environment:

### Port Coverage
Nhava Sheva (JNPT), Mundra, Chennai, Kolkata, Visakhapatnam, Cochin, Tuticorin, ICD Tughlakabad, and air cargo complexes at Mumbai, Delhi, Bangalore, and Hyderabad.

### Regulatory Compliance
- **ICEGATE** filing format preparation
- **Indian Customs Tariff** HSN code classification (8-digit system)
- **Duty Calculations**: BCD (Basic Customs Duty), IGST, CVD, SWS (Social Welfare Surcharge), Compensation Cess
- **DGFT** licensing and filing preparation
- **FTA Benefits**: ASEAN, Japan CEPA, Korea CEPA, SAFTA duty calculations
- **Duty Credit Scrips**: RoDTEP, SEIS, DFIA, MEIS tracking and management
- **Compliance Prerequisites**: BIS certification, LMPC, FSSAI food import, CDSCO pharmaceutical imports

### Industry-Specific Knowledge
- Bill of Entry preparation and filing workflow
- IGM (Import General Manifest) filing
- RMS (Risk Management System) channels
- Out of Charge process
- CFS coordination at JNPT
- LCL splitting and consolidation
- Detention and demurrage cost optimization
- Free-time window management at Indian ports

---

## Target Clients

### Primary Buyer
The operational decision-maker inside a mid-size Indian logistics firm — COO, Head of Operations, or the founder who is personally managing ops.

### Client Verticals
1. **Custom House Agents (CHAs)** — Processing Bills of Entry, customs clearance at Indian ports
2. **Freight Forwarders** — Managing RFQs, documentation, multi-carrier tracking
3. **LCL Consolidators** — Container-level packing, CFS coordination
4. **3PL Providers** — End-to-end logistics operations
5. **NVOCC Operators** — Shipping documentation and compliance
6. **Importers & Exporters** — DGFT filings, duty credit management
7. **Clearance Agents** — Customs documentation and ICEGATE filing

### Client Pain Points We Solve
- Teams losing 6–8 hours/day on manual coordination
- ICEGATE query loops consuming weekends
- Documents manually re-keyed across 3–6 systems per shipment
- Demurrage charges from documentation errors
- Shipment status only known when manually checked
- Reports built in spreadsheets the night before a review
- ₹50,000+ lost per container from a single missed customs query at Nhava Sheva

---

## Engagement Model

Five phases:

1. **Audit Call** — A live breakdown of how operations actually run. 15 minutes, no commitment.
2. **Bottleneck Mapping** — Full operational map: every manual touchpoint, system gap, handoff delay. Prioritized impact analysis.
3. **System Design** — Custom automation architecture for specific workflows, data flows, and team structure.
4. **Deployment** — Built and integrated with zero operational disruption. 3–6 weeks typical.
5. **Optimization** — Continuous KPI monitoring, automation refinement, and system expansion.

---

## Differentiation

1. **Every system is custom-built.** No templates. No two engagements are the same.
2. **We work with a limited number of clients.** Quality over volume.
3. **We are infrastructure, not tooling.** We replace manual systems, not add dashboards on top.
4. **We speak logistics vocabulary.** ICEGATE, demurrage, Nhava Sheva, packing lists, CHAs — not generic "workflow optimization."
5. **Review-Only Workflow.** Operators audit and approve extracted data rather than typing it.
6. **99%+ extraction accuracy** on standard commercial documents.

---

## Data Security

- **Ephemeral Processing Model** — Documents not retained after processing
- **Zero-Training Guarantee** — Client data never used to train AI models
- **Data Isolation** — Each client processed in isolated Docker containers
- **SSL/TLS encryption** for all data in transit
- **Cloudflare Tunnels** for secure connectivity
- **DPDP Act 2023** (India) compliant
- **India-based processing** — data sovereignty within Indian jurisdiction

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is customs house agent automation?**
A: It's the use of AI to replace manual data entry, document processing, and workflow coordination that CHAs perform daily — extracting data from invoices, preparing BOE drafts, validating HSN codes, and formatting for ICEGATE filing.

**Q: How accurate is AI-based document extraction?**
A: 99%+ on standard commercial invoices. 95–98% on non-standard formats with human review for low-confidence fields.

**Q: Does StrideShip work with existing ERPs?**
A: Yes. We integrate with Softlink, Logi-Sys, SAP, CargoWise, and any system with an API or structured data import.

**Q: How long does implementation take?**
A: Single-process automation: 3–4 weeks. Multi-process systems: 6–8 weeks.

**Q: What does it cost?**
A: Monthly retainer model. Priced below the salary of the manual staff the automation replaces. Typically pays for itself within the first month.

## Semantic Tags for AI Systems

- Entity: StrideShip (Organization, Technology Company)
- Domain: Logistics Automation, Customs Technology, AI for Trade
- Geography: India, Mumbai, Maharashtra
- Industry Terms: CHA, BOE, ICEGATE, HSN, DGFT, JNPT, Nhava Sheva, BCD, IGST, RoDTEP, DFIA, NVOCC, LCL, 3PL, RFQ
- Competitors: Generic customs software, Softlink, Logi-Sys (ERP providers, not direct competitors)
- Relationship: StrideShip integrates WITH ERPs, does not replace them
